description: Perform a fail-safe validation test on the OpenICE closed-loop infusion system. Create a simulated 'Pulse Oximeter' (Monitoring Source) and a simulated 'Infusion Pump' (Control Target). Using the 'Infusion Safety' clinical application, capture a baseline screenshot of the normal operating state to /home/ga/Desktop/test_01_baseline.png. Simulate a sensor failure by disconnecting the Pulse Oximeter while keeping the Infusion Pump and Safety App running. Capture a screenshot of the resulting fail-safe state to /home/ga/Desktop/test_02_failsafe.png. Document the system's reaction to the sensor disconnection in a test report at /home/ga/Desktop/failsafe_report.txt.
